summary: Tested Referral Program (Give $10, Get $10) and Order Tracking System. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/referral/code requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/referral/code returns valid referral_code, share_url, reward_amount (10.0), completed_referrals, total_earned
Backend: /api/referral/validate/{code} validates existing codes - returns valid=true, referrer_name, reward_amount, message
Backend: /api/referral/validate/INVALID returns 404
Backend: /api/referral/validate/{own_code} returns 400 - cannot use own code
Backend: /api/referral/stats returns total_referrals, pending_referrals, total_earned, referrals list
Backend: /api/referral/stats requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/orders/{id}/tracking requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/orders/nonexistent/tracking returns 404
Backend: Admin orders show tracking data (carrier, tracking_number, status, events)
Backend: /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking requires admin auth
Backend: /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking adds tracking and sets status to shipped
Backend: Tracking URLs generated correctly for UPS, FedEx, USPS, DHL
Backend: /api/loyalty/status returns points, tier, lifetime_points, next_tier, points_to_next_tier
Frontend: Referral page displays referral code (CALMF63E)
Frontend: Referral page shows share URL (https://calmtails.com/ref/CALMF63E)
Frontend: Referral page shows How it works steps (share link, they get $10, you get $10+100 pts)
Frontend: Referral page has Share buttons (Twitter, Facebook, Email, Copy Link)
Frontend: Referral page shows stats cards (Friends Referred: 0, Total Earned: $0, Pending: 0)
Frontend: Account page shows Rewards card with points (0 pts), tier (Bronze), progress bar
Frontend: Account page shows Referral card with code and Share button
Frontend: Account page shows Order History section
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows orders with shipped/pending status badges
Frontend: Admin dashboard displays 3 shipped orders with tracking
seed_data_creation: 5 orders exist in system (3 shipped with tracking, 2 pending). Admin user has referral code CALMF63E.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral Program fully implemented - users get unique codes like CALMF63E, share URL format is https://calmtails.com/ref/{CODE}. Order tracking shows progress steps (Order Placed → Processing → Shipped → Out for Delivery → Delivered) with carrier info, tracking number, and events history. Admin can add tracking via /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking which auto-sets order status to 'shipped'. Email notifications for shipping use Resend API - MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY configured).

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: RESEND_API_KEY not configured - shipping notification emails won't be sent
mocked_apis.17Track API: TRACK17_API_KEY not configured - tracking info is stored locally, not fetched from external API

referral_api.get_code: /api/referral/code - returns user's referral_code, share_url, completed_referrals, total_earned
referral_api.validate: /api/referral/validate/{code} - validates code, returns valid=true/false, referrer_name, reward_amount
referral_api.apply: /api/referral/apply/{code} - applies referral, creates promo code for referee
referral_api.stats: /api/referral/stats - returns total_referrals, pending_referrals, total_earned, referrals list

tracking_api.get_tracking: /api/orders/{id}/tracking - returns has_tracking, carrier, tracking_number, status, events, tracking_url
tracking_api.admin_add: /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking POST - adds tracking (carrier, tracking_number), sets status to shipped
tracking_api.admin_update: /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking PUT - updates tracking status, adds events

frontend_referral_page.stats_cards: Friends Referred, Total Earned, Pending Referrals

frontend_account_page.rewards_card: Shows points, tier (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum), progress bar to next tier
frontend_account_page.referral_card: Shows code (CALMF63E), Share button linking to /referral page
frontend_account_page.order_history: Lists orders with status badges, expandable to show OrderTracking component

order_tracking_component.progress_steps: Order Placed → Processing → Shipped → Out for Delivery → Delivered
order_tracking_component.tracking_details: Carrier name, tracking number, Track button with external link
